user_message: Can you pull the context on Alpine Ski House? I need to map the stakeholders.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 12:58 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about migration architecture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-02 17:35 EST
Subject: migration architecture - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 16:28 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our COO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: migration architecture Discussion - Alpine Ski House
Date: 2024-03-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on migration architecture from our last session.

[00:08:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:19:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Pre-Meeting Brief template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct migration architecture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
